name: Luella
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Maelstrom Champion
factionTrait.text: A maelstrom moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy follower.

uniqueTraits.name: Momentum
uniqueTraits.text: When Luella makes an advance action, she may gain +1 {speed} for that action. If she does, she must move in a straight line.

ultimate.name: Storm Rider
ultimate.text: Move Luella up to 2 hexes. Then make a 3 {damage_die} damage roll against each enemy within range.

plotSkills.name: Lightning Flash
plotSkills.text: If Luella moved 3 or more hexes this activation, Lightning Flash is a bonus action. Hit Effect: Inflict {dodge_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Rolling Thunder
clashSkills.text: If Luella moved 3 or more hexes this activation, Rolling Thunder is a bonus action.

clashSkills.name: Arc Lightning
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: After the Arc Lightning damage roll, Luella may make a 3 {damage_die} damage roll against up to 2 other models within 1 hex of the target's hex.

traits.name: Protective
traits.text: At the end of the Shield Maidens' activation, if any Shield Maidens are adjacent to Luella, Luella gains {protection_boon}.

plotSkills.name: March
plotSkills.text: Move each Shield Maiden up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: March
clashSkills.text: Move each Shield Maiden up to 1 hex.
